content: Malborn: Gods, another night at this shithole. I swear the Thalmor drink more wine in a week than the whole of Valenwood in a year. You ever see those high-and-mighty bastards when they think no one's looking? Naked as newborns, rutting like animals in their Embassy halls. Jorn: Ha! At least we Nords fuck with honor—no sneaky elven pretense. Though damn if those Thalmor sluts don't flaunt it. Saw one bend over a balcony at the Palace once, skirt hiked, taunting every soldier below. Almost made me reconsider the Legion. Malborn: Pfft. The Legion’s just as bad—Imperials would sell their mothers for a night with a Thalmor diplomat. You really think beating a drum for Titus Mede’s dogs makes you better than them? Jorn: Maybe not better, but louder. My rhythms’ll send Stormcloaks running before a single sword’s drawn. Course, if they don’t run, I’ll bash their skulls in and take their women after—traitors don’t get last rites, just last fucks. Malborn: Spoken like a true Nord. Lust and bloodlust—no wonder the Dominion’s winning. Jorn: Ah, fuck the Dominion. Their spies might slither in silk, but one good warhammer can silence a whole choir of those golden-tongued snakes. And speaking of silks—ever sneak a taste of those bosmer wenches serving at the Embassy? Heard they train ’em to swallow anything. Malborn: Keep talking like that, and I’ll arrange for your drumsticks to disappear—permanently.
